steps.title: Use the problem-solution cue
steps.content: The phrase "To address this problem" points back to the difficulty of monitoring insects at night. The underlined sentence explains the method the team used to solve that monitoring problem.

steps.title: Separate method from findings
steps.content: B says the sentence questions a claim, which it does not. C discusses moth preference, which is not stated. D describes the later findings, not the underlined sentence. The remaining option identifies the research approach. The answer is A.
